name: <short-eval-name-kebab-case>
query: <a realistic user prompt that should trigger this skill>
files: <optional: paths to fixture files the eval depends on>
expected_behavior: <one specific, observable behavior — e.g. 'Reads SKILL.md before producing output'>
<another — e.g. 'Verdict is one of: Ready / Needs minor cleanup / Needs major refactor / Risky'>
_notes: Set should_NOT_trigger=true for negative-trigger evals (queries that sound similar but should route to a different skill). Author at least 1 negative eval per skill.
